name: smorch-dev
description: SMOrchestra internal development workflow plugin. 12 slash commands (smorch-dev-start session bootstrap, plan, code, score, bridge-gaps, handover, qa-handover-score, qa-run, ship, triage, retro, dev-guide) + 11 skills. /smorch-dev-start runs a 4-layer session bootstrap (machine + context + project + input-quality scoring) with GREEN/YELLOW/RED gate and --fix auto-heal — works on Mac, Windows, Linux, servers. 5-hat scoring with internal calibration (92+ ship gate, 8.5 hat floor, weighted top-3 per SOP-23). MENA checks (Arabic RTL + mobile 375px), BRD traceability, elegance pause, lessons.md self-improvement, QA handover scoring, cost tracking. For every SMOrchestra machine: Mamoun, Lana, future hires, QA.
